# Phase 1 reciprocal parity fixtures

`phase1-online.archimate` is generated by Archi Online and covers every Phase 1
contract: specializations, archive assets, custom/profile images, all image
positions, label-expression families and prefixes, complete VIEW-08 appearance,
Dublin Core metadata, and specialization interchange data.

`phase1-desktop.archimate` is the result of loading and saving that fixture with
installed Desktop Archi `5.9.0.202604140726`. The adjacent semantic JSON files
make normalized changes reviewable without treating byte-for-byte XML equality
as the compatibility contract.

Regenerate and verify:

```text
npm run fixtures:phase1
npm run verify:phase1:desktop
```

The verifier checks the installed version, invokes Desktop Archi with
`--loadModel` and `--saveModel`, reparses both documents, and compares normalized
semantics plus archive asset hashes. Visual equivalence is tracked separately in
`RENDERING-CHECKLIST.md`.
